policy.name: Staging team access
policy.purpose: Prevent public access to staging TMS data and Stripe test mode

dashboard_steps: 1. Zero Trust → Access → Applications → Add application
3. Add policy: Allow emails matching your team addresses
4. Identity provider: One-time PIN (email) or Google OAuth
5. Test in incognito — should challenge before dev.laslogtmx.com loads
6. Do NOT apply Access to app.laslogtmx.com or laslogtmx.com
rollback: Zero Trust → Access → Applications → laslogTMX Staging → Disable or delete policy
